/CAL:SENTENCING/TWS/X:THE DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED ON COUNT 1 AS FOLLOWS:/CH1:ISS:CPROB:PROB 3 Y:PJ 10D/CTS:10/X:THE COURT ORDERS THE DEFENDANT TO ENROLL AND COMPLETE AN 18 MONTH MULTIPLE OFFENDER'S DRUNK DRIVING PROGRAM,/LVAL/LCHEM/IID:1/PF460 12/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/EMAT/1463ALC/CITE//X:AS TO COUNT 2, THE COURT INDICATES THE SENTENCE IS IDENTICAL TO COUNT 1AND IS STAYED PURSUANT TO PC 654,/X:AS TO COUNT 4 THE DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED AS FOLLOWS:/X:THE DEFENDANT SHALL SERVE A TERM IN COUNTY JAIL OF 10 DAYSAND SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED OF 10 DAYS,/VF2:150/COA:40/ICNA//COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 101 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCEAS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/

/CAL:DISPOSITION/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL//DEFT ADV NL:1, 2 AND 4/NOLO/X:DEFENDANT ADMITS THE ALLEGATION PURSUANT TOVC 23578 AND ALSO ADMITS PRIOR CONVICTION(S) OF VC 23152(B) AS TRUE,/X:PLEA IS OPEN TO THE COURT,/X:THE COURT GRANTS THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S MOTIONTO DISMISS COUNT 3 PURSUANT TO PC 1385 AND ALSO DISMISSES COUNT 5 IN THE INTEREST OF JUSTICE,/
/CAL:DEF BRADY MOT-REQ FOR IN CAMERA REV, CHP OPPOSITION/X:BRADY IN CAMERAHRG CONDUCTED; RICK RIOS CHP #12893, SWORN & EXAMINED COURT FINDS NO MATIALS TO BE REVIEWED FOR BRADY/

/CAL:PROOF OF 7 AA SESSIONS OR OUTPATIENT PROGRAM & TS MTS/DAWT/X:DEFENSECOUNSEL SHOWED PROOF TO THE PEOPLE,/X:COURT ADMONISHED DEFENSE COUNSEL THAT DEFENDANT TO CONTINUE   ENROLLING IN THE PROGRAM, DEFENDANT TO PROVIDE PROOF EVERY TWO WEEKS  TO THE PEOPLE,/CONTD:PRETRIAL OR POSSIBLE MOTION TO STRIKE PRIOR/DOPU:DEFENDANT IN PROGRAM/

/CAL:TO SET AND DECISION REGARDING SCRAM/DAWT/X:COURT DENIES ADA'S REQUESTFOR SCRAM WITH THE FOLLOWING CONDITION:/DEF:IS TO ATTEND AA OR INTENSIVEOUT-PATIENT PROGRAM AT LEAST THREE TIMES PER WEEK AND PROVIDE PROOF OF PARTICIPATION TO THE COURT/CONTD:PROOF OF SEVEN SESSIONS OF AA OR PROGRAM/DOPU:COMPLIANCE WITH PROGRAM REQUIREMENT/

/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN/PD/BWDNC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/GTWM/X:ADA REQUEST FOR SCRAM REQUIREMENT IS DENIED FOR NOW, WITH DECISION AWAITING FURTHER INFORMATION ON 02-04-15,/CONTD:TO SET AND DECISION REGARDING SCRAM/DAWF/
/CAL:PTC & PROOF OF AA MEETINGS/DAWT/CONTD:DISPOSITION/
/CAL:PRETRIAL & PROOF OF AA MEETINGS/CONTD:PRETRIAL/X:DAW IF PROOF OF AA PROVIDED,/
/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN/BWDNC/OR/CONTD:PROOF OF AA MEETING AND PRETRIAL/DOPU:PROOF OF AA MEETING SUBMITTED/
